signup.title: Sign up
signup.hasAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
signup.checkEmail: A confirmation email was sent. Please click the link in the email, then sign in.

errors.shortPassword: Password must be at least 6 characters
errors.emailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email before signing in
errors.emailTaken: Email is already registered. Try signing in
errors.rateLimit: Too many attempts. Try again in a minute
errors.network: No internet connection. Try again when back online
errors.appleUnavailable: Sign in with Apple isn't available on this device
errors.appleNoToken: Apple didn't return a valid token. Try again
errors.appleFailed: Sign in with Apple failed. Try again
errors.googleNotConfigured: Sign in with Google isn't configured. Contact support
errors.googleNoToken: Google didn't return a valid token. Try again
errors.googlePlayServices: Google Play Services required. Please update your device
errors.googleFailed: Sign in with Google failed. Try again

profile.heading: Emergency medical card
profile.subheading: Stored encrypted and shown to first responders via the lock-screen widget.

errors.itemEmpty: Empty item — remove it or fill it in
errors.loadFailed: Failed to load profile. Try again

contacts.title: Emergency contacts
contacts.lead: Responders try contacts in this order. The first three appear in the lockscreen widget.
contacts.empty: No contacts yet. Add your first one.
contacts.reorderLead: Move contacts up or down. The first one is called first.
contacts.deleteConfirmBody: {{name}} will be removed from your emergency contacts. You can add them back anytime.
contacts.loadFailed: Failed to load contacts. Try again.

qr.title: Emergency QR code
qr.subtitle: Emergency responders scan this to see your medical information

rotate.title: Rotate QR code
rotate.body: Any existing sticker on your helmet or bike will stop working immediately. You will need to print a new sticker with the new code.

error.title: Failed to load code
error.body: Check your network and try again.
